title: Verify events are fired correctly during Trial Corner interactions
description: Test that all specified events are fired with correct attributes during user interactions

steps.description: 1. View trial widget - check trial-corner-widget-viewed event
2. Click trial widget - check trial-corner-widget-clicked event
3. View Trial Corner - check trial-corner-viewed event
5. Click trending item - check trial-corner-trending-clicked event

expected_result: All events fired with correct attributes including variant type, page source, and content IDs as specified in PRD
